title: Single by Chance, Mothers by Choice: How Women are Choosing Parenthood Without Marriage and Creating the New American Family By Rosanna Hertz Oxford University Press, 2006. 264 pages. $26 cloth
abstract: Single by Chance, Mothers by Choice: How Women are Choosing Parenthood Without Marriage and Creating the New American Family By Rosanna Hertz Oxford University Press, 2006. 264 pages. $26 cloth Get access Frances Goldscheider Frances Goldscheider University of Maryland Search for other works by this author on: Oxford Academic Google Scholar Social Forces, Volume 86, Issue 4, June 2008, Pages 1852–1853, https://doi.org/10.1353/sof.0.0051 Published: 01 June 2008
